message:
feat(core): expand connection handling and refresh conformance golden checksums

- connection.rs: Extend connection management with additional concurrent
  transaction handling improvements
- core_sql_golden_blake3.json: Regenerate golden Blake3 checksums for
  the conformance test suite reflecting current query plan and output
  state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
